notes: 2-channel Class H professional power amplifier, 5000W bridged at 4 ohms. 3RU chassis. Official QSC spec page lists inputs as XLR (pin 2+) and 3-pin Euro-style detachable terminal block (euroblock) only — some retailer listings also mention 1/4\" TRS inputs, but these are not confirmed by the authoritative QSC source and may reflect the older non-\"a\" RMX 5050 model. Speakon connector format (NL2 vs NL4) not explicitly stated in spec. Power cord is captive with NEMA 5-20 plug (20A); the nema-5-15 connector ID is used as the closest available match. 230V export versions use CEE 7/7 plug.

ports.name: Ch A Input (Euroblock)
ports.note: 3-pin Euro-style detachable terminal block, active balanced

ports.name: Ch B Input (Euroblock)
ports.note: 3-pin Euro-style detachable terminal block, active balanced

ports.name: Ch A Output (Speakon)
ports.note: Neutrik Speakon; NL4 format typical for QSC but not explicitly stated in spec

ports.name: Ch B Output (Speakon)
ports.note: Neutrik Speakon; NL4 format typical for QSC but not explicitly stated in spec

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Captive cord with NEMA 5-20 plug (20A, 120V); nema-5-15 is closest available connector ID but actual plug is NEMA 5-20. 230V models use CEE 7/7.
